name: editable-heading
title: Editable Heading
description: An interactive heading styled as a text field that reveals a formatting toolbar on click. Supports bold, italic, underline, alignment, and font size controls. Inspired by Kree8's landing page design.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content displayed in the heading

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the trigger button
